title: [JTS] Add statistics
author: boomanaiden154
description: This patch adds some statistics to the jump-table-to-switch pass. This will make it easier to see in aggregate how changing the profitability heuristics impacts how often the optimization fires.

tests.test_body:
define i32 @func2() {
  %a = add i32 0, 1
  %b = add i32 %a, 1
  %c = add i32 %b, 1
  %d = add i32 %c, 1
  ret i32 %d
}
